title: rhododendron mucronulatum f. ciliatum
intro: Rhododendron mucronulatum f. ciliatum, also known as Korean rosebay, is a flowering plant species in the family Ericaceae, characterized by its showy, fragrant flowers and dark green leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rhododendron mucronulatum f. ciliatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Rhododendron mucronulatum f. ciliatum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
